comment_content:
Farke had a better than usual managerial performance but that was only in the second half. It still is not good enough. We will get relegated again thanks to Farke and the 49'ers. We will be down for a decade after this season's relegation and especially if we continue to be owned by the clueless 49'ers with Paraag Marathe as CEO along with the car boot sale Recruitment Team!

We did well in the second half but the damage was done in the first when we were terrible. We lost at the end with schoolboy defending. Farke’s changes came too late. Ultimately, picking up points is what matters—and we didn’t. Farke's one point a game plan is not a good strategy for staying in the Premier League. It is a losers strategy and he is not even meeting that target, or his own low standards. 

I have always stated that giving Farke 10 games to prove himself would be terminal for us. How many chances does this guy need? We have now given Farke 13 games to prove himself. Has he? The table does not lie.
